summary: A White House-branded clip of President Trump's Congressional Picnic remarks from the balcony lectern, with a red and white title card ('President Trump Celebrates Congressional Picnic At The White House'), burned-in captions, and a 'TEXT POTUS to 45470' banner. The footage is a speech with continuous talking and no music.
notable_text: President Trump Celebrates Congressional Picnic At The White House; TEXT "POTUS" TO 45470 FOR UPDATES FROM THE WHITE HOUSE; THE WHITE HOUSE
